title: Simply Everything
description: A modpack designed to improve the vanilla experience with quality of life mods. With a base of Fabulously Optimized, your game will feel as smooth as ever!
body:
# Simply Everything

### 🛠 A Quality-of-Life Overhaul Modpack for Minecraft 1.21-1.21.5

**Simply Everything** is a hand-tuned modpack focused on refining and enhancing the vanilla Minecraft experience. With smoother menus, smarter inventory handling, immersive visuals and audio, and tools that just make sense, this pack streamlines the game without losing its charm.

No bloated tech trees. No grindy progression. Just **clean, beautiful, optimized gameplay.**

---

## ✅ Features at a Glance

### 🖥️ Enhanced Interface
- Reimagined menus, detailed HUD, and modern tooltips
- Dynamic F3 screen, control helpers, and menu customization

### 🎒 Better Inventory & Crafting
- Smarter inventory logic
- Tooltip previews for shulker boxes
- Simplified crafting and visual organization

### 🎧 Visual & Audio Immersion
- 3D skin layers and entity improvements
- Realistic ambient sounds and falling leaves
- Shader support with Iris (preconfigured for Complementary Shaders – Low)

### 📢 Communication Tools
- Expanded chat history and cleaner message formatting
- Built-in Simple Voice Chat support

### ⚙️ Customization & Control
- Tweak HUDs, keybinds, mod configs, and even the main menu credits
- All mods are carefully chosen to work together seamlessly

---

## 🖥️ System Requirements

### **Minimum:**
- **CPU:** Intel Core i3-12100 or AMD Ryzen 5 3400G  
- **GPU:** GTX 1650 Super or RX 580 8GB  
- **RAM:** 16GB  
- **Storage:** SSD with 250MB/s read speed *(HDDs not supported)*  

### **Recommended:**
- **CPU:** Ryzen 5 4500 or better  
- **GPU:** RX 6600 or RTX 3060+  
- **RAM:** 32GB+  
- **Storage:** NVMe SSD recommended  

---

## ☕ Installation Instructions

1. **Install Java 24** from Oracle: [Java 24 Download](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/#jdk24-windows)  
2. Open the Minecraft Launcher and click the ⚙️ **Settings** icon beside the "Play" button.  
3. Select **Custom Java Installation**.  
4. In the file path field, paste: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin
5. Scroll down to find `javaw.exe`, click on it, then press **Open**.  
6. Under "Memory", allocate **6–8 GB** of RAM.  
7. That’s it! Click **Play** and enjoy the modpack.

---

---

## 🎯 Why Choose Simply Everything?

- ✅ **Seamless Compatibility:** Every mod is tested and tuned for synergy—no bugs, no bloat.  
- 🧩 **Highly Customizable:** Tweak your experience to match your playstyle, from visuals to controls.  
- 🎮 **Instant Quality-of-Life:** Get all the modern conveniences without changing the spirit of Minecraft.  
- 🔧 **Performance-Aware:** Carefully curated with optimization mods like ModernFix and FastQuit.

---

## 📝 Notes from the Creator

- I will only update the pack to a new Minecraft or mod version if *all* included mods support it.  
- New mods will only be added if there is significant community interest or if the mod becomes popular enough to appear prominently on the mods page.  
- If you think something should be added, feel free to add it yourself! I don’t have a direct contact method, so collaboration is community-driven.

---

**Experience Minecraft the way it should feel—snappy, immersive, and effortlessly fun.**
